title: Pharmacy Assistant
description: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals seeks a Pharmacy Assistant to support our clinical trial pharmacy operations. You will manage inventory of investigational drugs, prepare and dispense study medications to trial participants, and maintain precise documentation required for FDA compliance. Working remotely, you'll coordinate with our Bethesda clinical team to ensure participants receive medications on schedule while adhering to strict research protocols.
responsibilities: Receive, verify, and log investigational drug shipments according to chain-of-custody protocols
Prepare study medications in compliance with protocol specifications and dispense to trial participants
Maintain detailed medication logs and manage pharmacy inventory database systems
Respond to participant medication-related questions and troubleshoot adherence issues
Monitor expiration dates and coordinate proper disposal of expired study drugs
Generate pharmacy reports for quarterly regulatory inspections and audit documentation

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; pharmacy technician training program completion preferred
skills: Basic computer literacy and data entry
certifications: CPhT certification preferred but not required for entry-level positions

benefits: Comprehensive health insurance with medical, dental, and vision coverage
Educational assistance for pharmacy technician certification programs
Flexible remote schedule with option for occasional on-site support
Paid time off: 12 days vacation, 8 days sick leave, 5 paid holidays
